candidates.why: Separate operating D&A line above operating profit, so it does not appear embedded within the selected COGS row 'Materials and services'. However, the label is a company-wide/unsplit depreciation line and does not specifically indicate COGS or cost of sales, so assigning it to COGS_DA would be uncertain and risks misallocation or double counting.

variables.notes: A separate operating D&A row exists, but it is not clearly tied to COGS. Conservative treatment is to avoid adding it to COGS_DA without a functional split.

candidates.why: Separate operating D&A line above operating profit and therefore not obviously embedded within the selected XSGA component rows 'Staff costs' and 'Other Operating Expenses'. But the row is unsplit and not specifically labelled as SG&A/admin/selling/R&D depreciation, so assigning it to XSGA_DA would be uncertain and could misclassify a total operating D&A amount.

variables.notes: R:c. The only visible D&A row is a generic total operating depreciation/impairment line. Because no SG&A-specific D&A split is shown, do not add it to XSGA_DA automatically.
